title: Disable Opportunities Connect Boards Accounts & Contacts 2 boards default

posts.author: mattczh (Matthew Chan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Today i just had an app break for a simple reason - the enterprise opportunities connect board column allows them to pick contacts for accounts and accounts for contacts.

Why did this feature get pushed through? It is a sales hygiene nightmare, plus it’s brekaing certain app flows.

What are you trying to achieve

Allow the option to remove the Contacts board from the Accounts Connect Board.
Allow the option to remove the Accounts board from the Contacts connect Board.
